nodes.label: Module to read Neware NDAX files.
Read data from a Neware .ndax zipped file.      Args:         file: Path to .
Read metadata from VersionInfo.xml and Step.xml in a Neware .ndax file.
Find all auxiliary channel files.      Args:         zf: open zipfile (ndax)
Extract .ndc from a zipfile and reads it into a DataFrame.
Forward fill and interpolate missing data in the DataFrame.
Read electrochemical data from a Neware ndc binary file.      Args:         b
Read bytes into a polars DataFrame.      Args:         buf: Bytes object cont
